careers.4: We are always looking for talented, driven professionals to join our growing team across East and Central Africa.
careers.7: Lake Group offers careers with real impact, you'll work across one of East Africa's most dynamic businesses, with genuine opportunities to grow, lead and make a difference.
careers.8: With 4,600+ employees across 8 countries and 21 nationalities, we are a truly pan-African team united by shared values: Quality, Service, Safety and Professionalism.
careers.12: Work on projects that shape East Africa's development
careers.16: Industry-leading safety standards in all operations
careers.35: Even if no specific role matches your profile, we welcome speculative applications from talented professionals.
careers.57: Tell us about yourself and what you bring to Lake Group...
concrete.4: Gulf Concrete and Cement Products, Dar es Salaam's market-leading ready-mix concrete supplier since 2010.
concrete.7: Gulf Concrete and Cement Products Company Ltd (GCCP), established in 2010, is one of the leading suppliers of ready-mix concrete in Dar es Salaam, involved in many of the city's most prestigious construction projects.
concrete.8: GCCP operates its own quarry at Lugoba with two aggregate plants of 250 tons/hour capacity each, producing 30,000 m³ of aggregate monthly. Its ready-mix operations are powered by Sany International batching plants from China.
concrete.9: In Dubai, Lake Group operates MERM (Middle East Ready Mix LLC), one of the largest premix plants in the region.
concrete.30: For projects requiring fast formwork removal and accelerated construction schedules.
concrete.32: Low shrinkage formulation for slabs, pavements and structures where crack control is critical.
concrete.34: Flows and consolidates under its own weight, ideal for congested reinforcement.
concrete.36: High-finish concrete for facades, decorative surfaces and exposed structural elements.
concrete.38: Permeable concrete for sustainable drainage in car parks, roads and landscaping.
concrete.40: High-strength, highly durable concrete for piling, deep foundations and critical structures.
contact.4: Reach our team for enquiries, partnerships, quotes or any information about Lake Group and its subsidiaries.
contact.6: We're Happy to Hear From You
container_services.4: African Inland Container Depot (AFICD) and Container Freight Station (ACFS), port extension solutions across East Africa.
container_services.6: The Inland Gateway to East African Trade
container_services.7: AFICD (African Inland Container Depot) and ACFS (African Container Freight Station) are Lake Group's port logistics arms, providing critical container storage, handling and customs services that extend port capacity into the hinterland.
container_services.8: With operations in Tanzania, Zambia and Mozambique, our container services are positioned at strategic corridors to serve regional importers, exporters and shipping lines.
container_services.21: Dar es Salaam, gateway to East Africa's largest economy
container_services.24: Inland depot serving the Zambia-Tanzania corridor
container_services.27: Strategic port logistics for Beira corridor trade flows
csr.4: Lake Group is committed to giving back to the communities it serves and operating with minimal environmental impact.
csr.7: As one of East Africa's largest private employers, Lake Group takes its social and environmental responsibilities seriously. The Group regularly provides support to community development through many of its CSR activities and is one of the leaders among its peers.
csr.8: We believe that business growth and community development go hand in hand, and that our success must translate into tangible benefits for the people and environments in which we operate.
csr.19: Supporting scholarships, vocational training and STEM education for youth in Tanzania and across the region, building the next generation of energy professionals.
csr.21: Contributing to the construction and renovation of community facilities, roads, water points, health clinics and public amenities in operational areas.
csr.23: Responsible handling of petroleum products, zero-tolerance for spillage, and progressive adoption of cleaner operations. Active reclamation of quarry land at Lugoba.
csr.25: 4,600+ jobs across 8 countries, with a strong preference for hiring and developing local talent at every level of the organisation.
csr.27: Supporting reliable LPG access for households across East Africa, reducing dependence on charcoal, improving air quality and lowering deforestation pressure.
csr.29: Industry-leading safety standards across all divisions. Zero-harm ambition for employees, contractors and the communities we operate in.

fleet.4: Over 700 purpose-built trucks operating 24/7 across East and Central Africa, the backbone of our logistics operations.
fleet.13: Heavy-duty tankers for bulk liquid petroleum transport. Capacity from 30,000 to 60,000 litres. Full hazmat certification and GPS tracking.
fleet.18: Versatile flatbed and curtain-side trailers for steel, construction materials, containers and oversized cargo across the region.
fleet.22: Specialised pressurised tankers for bulk LPG transport between bottling plants and distribution points across East Africa.
fleet.26: 20 truck mixers (12m³ each) dedicated to GCCP ready-mix concrete delivery to construction sites across Dar es Salaam.
fleet.30: Reach stackers, terminal tractors and container trucks for AFICD inland depot operations in Tanzania, Zambia and Mozambique.
fleet.34: Support fleet of pickups, service vehicles and supervisor cars for field operations, maintenance and last-mile delivery support.
fuel.4: One of Tanzania's top 5 petroleum distributors, supplying quality fuel across 8 countries in East and Central Africa.
fuel.7: Lake Oil Ltd. is the flagship company of Lake Group and one of Tanzania's top 5 distributors of petroleum products. Founded in 2006, it has established a strong footprint across all of East and Central Africa.
fuel.8: We supply white petroleum products including petrol, diesel and aviation fuel through retail stations, bulk delivery and strategic storage facilities across the region.
fuel.9: ✓Retail fuel stations, 85+ across Tanzania and the region
fuel.10: ✓Bulk petroleum supply for corporate and government clients
fuel.11: ✓Own oil storage facilities in Tanzania, Kenya, Burundi and DRC
fuel.12: ✓Competitive pricing backed by regional supply chain scale
fuel.13: ✓Quality products meeting national and international standards
fuel.39: Ranked among the top 5 petroleum distributors in Tanzania by volume.
fuel.41: Strategic storage facilities in Tanzania, Kenya, Burundi and DRC.
fuel.43: Integrated logistics fleet for reliable, on-time delivery every time.
fuel.45: Pan-African fuel supply capability across East and Central Africa.
